title: Strimmer Line 2mm/3mm*5m/10m/15m/45m Steel Wire Nylon Grass Trimmer Line Long Round Brushcutter Trimmer Rope Lawn Mower Replacement Multi Wire Steel Wire Rope (2mmx15M)
features: The scraping wire is made of a tough nylon surface and a steel core twisted from multiple steel wires, which is durable and not easy to break. Compared with traditional nylon thread, it has strong cutting force and higher toughness, making it easy to cut hard grass and stubborn weeds.

The metal lawn mower production line has a variety of specifications to meet any of your needs. Our steel wire lawn mower rope has a steel wire content of about 95% and a plastic outer shell content of 5%.
The wire weeding machine rope is easy to install, and you can also cut the length according to your needs.
A replacement trimming line for filling spools, suitable for garden trimmers and lawn mowers. Remove grass from the yard, weeds from the field, trim the edges of the lawn, etc.
The rubber coated steel wire rope can be compatible with most lawn mowers on the market, making your garden look clean and tidy.
description: Product Description The birth story of the product Original method I come from a peasant family in the distant East, and my parents and I have been living in the mountains since I was born. Parents will do weeding every summer to prepare for sowing. Weeding machine Looking at my parents' aging hands, I feel very guilty inside. Thank them for everything they have done for me and my brother. I used my first salary from my job after graduating from college to buy weed control machines for my parents. My parents were very happy and bid farewell to the days of manual weeding. But problems also arise. Imperfect weed control machine head The plastic rope equipped with the weeding machine is too fragile and cannot remove thicker vegetation. So I bought blades for my parents, but the blades are too dangerous to use and can break and splash out when they come into contact with rocks. In the end, I purchased steel wire ropes for them. However, steel wire ropes in the market are not perfect. Thus began the research and production of our weeding machine wire rope I discussion with the R&D and production personnel of factory In order to provide my parents with the best weed wire rope, I had a series of discussions with my factory's R&D and production personnel. In the end, we improved and developed the industrial steel wire rope, and produced an upgraded version of the weeding steel wire rope. Steel wire rope can be used for weeding and can withstand strong tensile forces, making it suitable for camping and outdoor scenes. The original text of the discussion is more interesting, so I posted it for haha Compared to steel wire ropes in the market, having more steel wire means it is more durable. More steel wire, so it can be used in various scenarios Multi strand galvanized steel wire 8-strand steel wire weaving Wrapped in PVC plastic Safer than blades, more durable and powerful than plastics Finally, thank you very much for watching our story. If you have any better suggestions, please let us know. Thank you very much for recognizing our product!
